text: Hey, I can't seem to access my account from the app, but my login details are correct. Any idea what's up?

Hey there! So, I’ve been tryin to access my account, but it keeps sayin there’s an issue. I’ve reset my password and everything, but still no luck. Can you help me figure out what’s going on? I’m not sure if my accout got locked or what, but it’s super frustrating!

I need to express my dissatisfaction regarding the recent service provided. I had an issue with my account, and despite multiple attempts to resolve it through your support channels, I received no help. This has become incredibly frustrating, and I would like to know what steps can be taken to get this sorted out promptly.
